title: malus americana
intro: Malus americana, also known as the American Crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Malus americana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Malus americana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the bark, leaves, or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
